assertions.description: Calls write(graph) or gexf.write(graph) from graphology-gexf to produce GEXF string
assertions.evidence: import { write, parse } from 'graphology-gexf'; const gexfString = write(graph)

assertions.description: Calls parse(UndirectedGraph, gexfString) or read() from graphology-gexf to reconstruct the graph
Calls forceAtlas2.inferSettings(graph) to generate settings object
Calls raw forceAtlas2(graph, { iterations, settings }) — NOT forceAtlas2.assign()
assertions.evidence: const positions = forceAtlas2(parsed, { iterations: 50, settings: inferredSettings }) — returns positions map, then applies via updateEachNodeAttributes

assertions.description: Logs or reads x and y attributes from nodes after ForceAtlas2 runs
Calls graph.emptyCopy() and logs order and size of the result
assertions.evidence: const stripped = parsed.emptyCopy(); ... logs stripped.order and stripped.size
